headline: Blackstone Stock Eyes $140 as Recovery Gains Steam
summary: Blackstone Inc. (NYSE: BX) has had a turbulent 2026, sliding from year-end highs before staging a meaningful recovery. With earnings due in less than a week, this is an important moment to assess where the alternative asset management giant stands.
